description:
Implement a 3-page onboarding carousel in the 'TravelBuddy' app using ViewPager2 and TabLayout. Create an item layout in res/layout/item_onboarding.xml containing an ImageView, a Title TextView, and a Description TextView. Update res/layout/activity_main.xml to include the ViewPager2 and a TabLayout for page indicators. Create an adapter class named OnboardingAdapter to bind the following data (using resources provided in res/values/strings.xml and res/drawable/) to the UI:
- Page 1: Icon ic_explore, Title "Explore the World", Description "Discover hidden gems..."
- Page 2: Icon ic_plan, Title "Plan Your Trip", Description "Organize flights and hotels..."
- Page 3:
